title: A crash occurs when preparing an INSERT on joined tables during the query semantic phase
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test201 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test201 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.50);
INSERT INTO test201 (id, name, value) SELECT temp.id, temp.name, parent.value FROM (VALUES (2, 'Sample')) AS temp(id, name) JOIN test201 parent ON (parent.id = temp.id);
INSERT INTO test201 (id, name, value) SELECT temp.id, temp.name, NULL FROM (VALUES (3, 'Example')) AS temp(id, name) LEFT JOIN test201 parent ON (parent.id = temp.id);
key_bug_features: INSERT on joined tables during query semantic phase
